import io
import string

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn second_token(_ s: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    if is_ws(byte_of(s, i))
      i = i + 1
    else
      done = true
    end
  end
  if i >= n
    None
  else
    done = false
    while i < n and not done
      if is_ws(byte_of(s, i))
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
    done = false
    while i < n and not done
      if is_ws(byte_of(s, i))
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
    if i >= n
      None
    else
      let start = i
      done = false
      while i < n and not done
        if is_ws(byte_of(s, i))
          done = true
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
      Some(string.substring(s, start, i))
    end
  end
end

fn value_for(_ line: String) -> Int
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    0
  else
    match second_token(trimmed)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        n
      when None
        0
      end
    when None
      0
    end
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut reading = true
while reading
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    total = total + value_for(line)
  when None
    reading = false
  end
end

println("sum=#{total}")
